changelog:
v2.2.1

  • Auto-updater: update the plugin from WordPress admin with one click
  • Auto permalink flush on first multisite sync (no more manual Settings > Permalinks)
  • Smart search: autocomplete dropdown, typo tolerance, phrase matching, recency boost, popularity ranking
  • Click tracking for search result popularity

v2.1.4

  • Fixed category display in search results
  • Removed left border from cards
  • Colored category headings
  • Badge removed from cards under grouped headings
